title: Small businesses win big in Knysna, Plett
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Nearly 60 entrepreneurs from Knysna and Bitou have completed a transformative 12-week SMME accelerator programme, walking away with critical business knowledge, mentorship, and a combined R1.4m in grant funding to help grow their businesses.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Nearly 60 entrepreneurs from Knysna and Bitou have completed a transformative 12-week SMME accelerator programme, walking away with critical business knowledge, mentorship, and a combined R1.4m in grant funding to help grow their businesses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The initiative, launched in June, was a collaborative effort between Standard Bank, the Knysna and Bitou municipalities, Classic Oriental Consultancy, and SMTAX."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme focused on key business fundamentals such as financial management, compliance, leadership, systems development, and sustainability.","html":"The programme focused on key business fundamentals such as financial management, compliance, leadership, systems development, and sustainability."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In Knysna, 36 SMMEs completed the programme. The top three in the presentation competition were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st prize (R100 000): Olwethu Phike of 24 Media","html":"1st prize (R100 000): Olwethu Phike of 24 Media"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd prize (R80 000): Lorraine Miles of KwaLorraine's Eatery","html":"2nd prize (R80 000): Lorraine Miles of KwaLorraine's Eatery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3rd prize (R65 000): Lamla Sibali of Lagasi, who also received the R15 000 Trailblazer Award, voted by peers.","html":"3rd prize (R65 000): Lamla Sibali of Lagasi, who also received the R15 000 Trailblazer Award, voted by peers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seven other finalists each received R20 000 in funding.","html":"Seven other finalists each received R20 000 in funding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This programme has been a game-changer,\" said Phike. \"The facilitators were exceptional, and the prize will help me invest in equipment to take my business to the next level.\"","html":"\"This programme has been a game-changer,\" said Phike. \"The facilitators were exceptional, and the prize will help me invest in equipment to take my business to the next level.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miles reflected on the depth of training: \"We learned everything from costing to compliance. I've since implemented operational systems and plan to use the grant to expand and create jobs.\"","html":"Miles reflected on the depth of training: \"We learned everything from costing to compliance. I've since implemented operational systems and plan to use the grant to expand and create jobs.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In Bitou, 23 SMMEs completed a parallel programme. The top three were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st prize (R100 000): Sihle Lupundwana","html":"1st prize (R100 000): Sihle Lupundwana"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd prize (R80 000): Aretha Fete","html":"2nd prize (R80 000): Aretha Fete"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3rd prize (R65 000): Lemeez Isaacs","html":"3rd prize (R65 000): Lemeez Isaacs"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trailblazer Award (R15 000): Shaylen Van Wyk, voted by fellow participants","html":"Trailblazer Award (R15 000): Shaylen Van Wyk, voted by fellow participants"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Isaacs called the experience \"transfor-mative\", saying the 12 weeks sharpened her business model and long-term vision.","html":"Isaacs called the experience \"transfor-mative\", saying the 12 weeks sharpened her business model and long-term vision."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Anelisa Fete, also from Bitou, said the programme helped her reframe past failures as lessons and inspired renewed confidence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam praised the initiative, saying public-private partnerships like these are changing the narrative and empowering our communities.","html":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam praised the initiative, saying public-private partnerships like these are changing the narrative and empowering our communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Standard Bank's Nalendzani Mosomane reaffirmed the bank's commitment: \"Our success is built on the success of SMMEs. It's about showing up with real support.\"","html":"Standard Bank's Nalendzani Mosomane reaffirmed the bank's commitment: \"Our success is built on the success of SMMEs. It's about showing up with real support.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam (3rd from left) and Bitou Deputy Mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi (4th) with executives from Standard Bank. Photo: Bitou Municipality","html":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam (3rd from left) and Bitou Deputy Mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi (4th) with executives from Standard Bank. Photo: Bitou Municipality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In Knysna, the top 3 entrepreneurs in the initiative are, from left: Lamla Sibali (3rd), Olwethu Phike (1st) and Lorraine Miles (2nd).","html":" In Knysna, the top 3 entrepreneurs in the initiative are, from left: Lamla Sibali (3rd), Olwethu Phike (1st) and Lorraine Miles (2nd)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The top 3 winners for Bitou are, from left: Lemeez Isaacs (3rd), Sihle Lupundwana (1st) and Aretha Fete (2nd).","html":"The top 3 winners for Bitou are, from left: Lemeez Isaacs (3rd), Sihle Lupundwana (1st) and Aretha Fete (2nd)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam (left) and Deputy Mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi. Photo: Bitou Municipality","html":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam (left) and Deputy Mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi. Photo: Bitou Municipality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
